design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. High-contrast typography with a structural grayscale base. Color is used purely for function, categorization, and status.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-[#111827] leading-none

components.sidebar: bg-white border-r border-[#E5E7EB] w-64 flex flex-col h-screen fixed
components.kpi_card: bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-sm p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200
components.button_primary: bg-[#111827] text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#374151] hover:text-white transition-colors text-sm font-medium focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#111827] focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#111827] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] transition-colors text-sm font-medium
components.table_header: bg-[#F9FAFB] border-y border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#6B7280] font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4
components.badge_cloud: bg-[#002FA7]/10 text-[#002FA7] border border-[#002FA7]/20 rounded-sm px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold
components.badge_usb: bg-[#F59E0B]/10 text-[#F59E0B] border border-[#F59E0B]/20 rounded-sm px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold
components.badge_hybrid: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/20 rounded-sm px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Control Room' dense grid approach. No large, empty soft shadow cards. Use sharp, 1px border cards with `rounded-sm`.
Do not use generic Inter font. Apply Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Add via Google Fonts in index.html.
Data Tables are critical: include robust filters, search bars, and distinct plan badges (Cloud: Blue, USB: Amber, Hybrid: Emerald) using the colors defined.
For modals/dialogs, maintain the sharp-edged, high-contrast aesthetic. Dimmed backgrounds should be `bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm`.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="dealer-create-submit"`).
Use Phosphor Icons (via @phosphor-icons/react) for a sharp, technical look matching the dashboard aesthetic.
Ensure hover states explicitly declare text colors to maintain contrast.
